title: Democrats blast FCC Chair Carr's broadcast license threats as anti-First Amendment, 'totalitarian'
summary_full: Carr on Saturday blasted broadcasters shortly after President Donald Trump called reports that Iran struck five U.S. tanker planes "fake news."
summary_public: Carr on Saturday blasted broadcasters shortly after President Donald Trump called reports that Iran struck five U.S. tanker planes "fake news."

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: reports that Iran struck five U.S. tanker planes "fake news."
